issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows, including the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to LS lead associations in HubSpot, confirmed by HubSpot support. Home advisors and TCs were affected by redundant task notifications.
issues.workaround: Review LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually dismiss or reconcile the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred continued to generate post-referral check-in tasks instead of unenrolling from the workflow. The workflow filter did not include Closed Lost or Transferred deal stages as unenrollment criteria. Home advisors received erroneous follow-up tasks for dead deals.
issues.workaround: Manually unenroll any Closed Lost or Transferred deals from the post-referral workflow that received tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, then set to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that deal stage 'Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. TCs missed closing info collection tasks for affected deals.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window to ensure TC tasks are generated.

issues.title: Automated emails showing incorrect loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated workflow emails continued to reference the previous loan officer rather than the newly assigned one. The affected HA reported emails still showing the old LO (Paul) instead of the updated LO (Julie Yocum). The fix was applied by Luis on the product side.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend any automated emails that went out with the incorrect LO information.

issues.title: MRC deals moved to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted status were not triggering the TC workflow, leaving TCs without tasks to collect closing information. The issue affected MRC leads which typically have no loan officer assigned. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed a fix was applied.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately 2026-03-14 and 2026-04-01 to ensure TCs receive the appropriate closing tasks.
